2606.28391.title: Few-class Fidelity: Evaluating Explanations of Real-conditions CNN classifiers with Optimized Perturbations
2606.28391.paper_summary: The wide use of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) in numerous domains and real-world classification applications is justified by their high precision and automation speed, helping users concentrate on higher-expertise tasks. To better understand the models and avoid bias during deployment, eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques can be used after training. But as the list of XAI solutions expand, comparisons between them diverge, and consensus over their evaluation cannot be reached. This paper proposes a variation of Fidelity-based XAI metrics, with a focus on real-conditions applications, where the number of classes is often low. The approach generates in-distribution, uncertainty-provoking perturbations, to ensure proper measurement of the XAI methods faithfulness. As demonstration of the evaluation framework usefulness, it is compared with human-centric object localization and segmentation metrics. Once applied to both medical and natural imaging applications, it highlights the intricate correlation between domain, data curation, and XAI solution choices in order to validate training of a new CNN model.
2606.28391.paper_summary_zh: 卷積神經網絡（CNN）在眾多領域和現實世界分類應用中的廣泛使用，得益於其高精度和自動化速度，幫助用戶專注於更高專業性的任務。為了更好地理解模型並在部署過程中避免偏見，可以在訓練後使用可解釋人工智慧（XAI）技術。但隨著XAI解決方案的列表不斷擴展，它們之間的比較出現分歧，對於其評估的共識無法達成。本文提出了一種基於忠實度的XAI指標變體，重點關注實際條件下的應用，其中類別數量通常較少。該方法生成分佈內的、不確定性引發的擾動，以確保對XAI方法忠實度的正確測量。作為評估框架有效性的示範，將其與以人為中心的物體定位和分割指標進行比較。一旦應用於醫療和自然影像應用，該方法突顯了領域、數據策展和XAI解決方案選擇之間的複雜關聯，以驗證新CNN模型的訓練。
2606.28391.author: Wistan Marchadour et.al.
2606.28391.authors: Wistan Marchadour, Pedro Soto Vega, Franck Vermet, Mathieu Hatt
